action.reasoning: Observation: The best submitted checkpoint remains checkpoints_features_stable/best.pt with macro_f1=0.1749. Local full-val replay with the newly patched TTA-capable predict.py shows threecrop improves public OOD val macro-F1 over center and center_flip (0.0983 vs 0.0747/0.0868). Analysis: Although public val and hidden test are not perfectly aligned, TTA is a low-risk inference-only improvement for the proven CLIP-B feature-head checkpoint, and no further training is needed. Decision: Set predict.py default TTA mode to threecrop if present and submit the stable checkpoint for evaluation.

command_output.stdout: patched default TTA to threecrop if argparse default was found
